summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ICan Health & Safety Training Portal. Backend APIs 96% success rate with all new endpoints working. Frontend UI fully functional with ICan branding, clean design, and all core features operational.

minor_issues.issue: Test expected multiple status codes but endpoint correctly returns 200 with PDF
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact - test logic issue only

minor_issues.issue: Console warning about missing Description for DialogContent (accessibility)
minor_issues.impact: Accessibility warning only, no functional impact

passed_tests: Login page loads with ICan logo and clean design
Admin login (admin@icanschool.com / admin123) redirects to /admin
Staff login (julia@icanschool.com / staff123) redirects to /dashboard
Admin dashboard shows stats and charts with #FF8100 branding
Staff directory shows emails with edit/delete functionality
Staff invitation creates temp credentials (qKIQQts8bdE generated)
Staff edit functionality updates name, email, category
Staff deletion removes user from directory
Staff dashboard shows 6 training modules with 100% progress
Take Final Exam button available when modules completed
Module reader shows formatted content with clear sections
Certificate page shows proper status (admin/staff views)
Resources vault accessible with emergency contacts
Exam page works with 10 questions and navigation
All backend APIs working: authentication, modules, exams, certificates, progress, analytics
New API endpoints working: POST /api/users/invite, PUT /api/users/{id}/edit, DELETE /api/users/{id}, DELETE /api/certificates/{id}
Professional clean design with #FF8100 orange accent throughout
ICan branding consistent across all pages
Path builder navigation working
Proper authentication and route protection
